title: DZesty Juicy-Peppery Castelvetrano-Olives Quesadilla Grill
description: A midnight-craving Egyptian dish featuring castelvetrano-olives, grilled to perfection and seasoned with just the right amount of pepper for a satisfying flavor profile.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup shredded goat cheese or feta cheese

instructions: Preheat a grill or stovetop grill pan over medium-high heat.
Spread some of the olive oil on one side of each tortilla.
Arrange half of the olives and cheese evenly across half of the tortillas, leaving about 1 inch from the edge for sealing.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Fold the edges of the tortillas over the filling and place them seam-side down on the preheated grill or stovetop grill pan.
Cook until golden brown and cheese is melted, about 2-3 minutes per side.
